summary: Add the truthful M4 AI activity setup surface: unconfigured state explains that no network request occurs before provider selection and message send.

decisions.decision: The M4 AI rail defaults to an unconfigured setup panel and performs no provider/network operation until a later provider/send unit is explicitly invoked.
decisions.rationale: AC-10.a requires zero network calls with no provider, and the current product has no AI client or conversation transport to claim more.

testEvidence.criterion: The unconfigured AI surface is visible, actionable for Settings, and has no network side effect.
testEvidence.test: Render the activity with a mocked Settings action and inspect the setup copy.

red.outcome: RED: the AI activity component and setup copy were absent.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/ui/ai/AiActivity.test.tsx tests/ui/Workbench.test.tsx tests/ui/layout/WorkspaceFrame.test.tsx
green.outcome: GREEN: Test Files 3 passed (3); Tests 32 passed (32).

testEvidence.criterion: The application remains type-safe and source-policy clean.
testEvidence.test: Run TypeScript and repository lint/source policy.

red.outcome: RED: the first wiring pass pushed Workbench one line over the UI source limit.

green.command: pnpm.cmd lint; pnpm.cmd exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false
green.outcome: GREEN: source policy passed; TypeScript exited 0.

questions: C10 remains incomplete: provider HTTP clients, streaming, conversations, diff actions, agent mode, persistence, and secret-scan acceptance are not claimed by this setup-only unit.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
